reviews.review_description: I’ve never been able to experience music in such an immersive and unique way. The lush sounds are literally all around you and it was interesting to be able to change the mix of instruments in the song while listening. Highly recommended!
I don’t say this lightly—I love it!  It’s a completely new way to experience music, boiled down to everything that works intuitively and beautifully.
If you're here to be surprised by what your headset can do then I highly recommend this beautiful artwork, check out Saturnine too!

reviews.review_title: Novel and fun interaction w/ lush music
reviews.review_description: I’m a big fan of Symbion Project’s music, and this interactive experience of their new album lets me explore the layers of sounds in each song to to tease apart the wizardry they use in their production. The music itself is fantastic, and I especially dig the guest vocalists and the treatments SP gives to their voices. I wish I could experience all music in this sort of interactively way!

reviews.review_title: Amazing universe of sound and space
reviews.review_description: Amazing universe of sound and space!  Our family is really enjoying this immersive soundscape. Highly recommended, gets better every time we return to saturnine. The music is amazing, quality is exceptional and can’t wait for more from this developer. Amazing!
Very 'particle-y'. Nice overall, but could be more 'in your face'.
Nice escape into the music with fun interactions. First VR music experience in a a thumbs up from me
